= camel cmd span

Display OpenTelemetry spans from running Camel integrations


== Usage

[source,bash]
----
camel cmd span [options]
----



== Options

[cols="2,5,1,2",options="header"]
|===
| Option | Description | Default | Type
| `--filter` | Filter by trace ID, route, component, or exchange ID (substring match) |  | String
| `--flat` | Show flat list of individual spans instead of grouped traces |  | boolean
| `--limit` | Maximum number of spans to display | 500 | int
| `--logging-color` | Use colored logging | true | boolean
| `--sort` | Sort by trace, route, from, spans, routes, status, or duration |  | String
| `--trace` | Show waterfall view for a specific trace ID (substring match) |  | String
| `-h,--help` | Display the help and sub-commands |  | boolean
|===
